text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and I have just wrapped up a
training meeting, when...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Not yet? Ohhh... Come on! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Fine and dandy! I'm just waitin' for my folks to
message me back!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see their reaction to this video I took.
Here, take a look!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mama! Hey, Papa! I wanna introduce y'all to
the very heart of Japan—cherry blossoms! You
see...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The soul of Japan is in these cherry blossom
picnics they have! And I'm 'bout to have one right
now! Ain't that right, Fukukitaru? ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Hi, Taiki's mama and papa! Come to Japan
and see these lucky flowers for yourselves!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can't help smilin' when I watch it! I just know
they'll—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, speak of the devil! My papa just messaged
back!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Looks like they liked it too! He says, "Your video is so kawaii! Japanese spring looks wonderful! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
"Your clothes and way of speaking have changed
so much. We could have sworn you were...
Japanese"?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Have I lost touch with my Kentucky
roots?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: My folks said I seem Japanese!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I mean... I have tried my best to make lots of good memories here.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But what if I end up with only Japanese memories one day...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Am I gonna lose all my memories of back home?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Noooo! That would be tragic! I love both Japan
and America! I don't wanna forget either!
choice_data_list: Don't worry. I'm sure you won't forget.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... But... apparently I'm like a different person than I used to be!
choice_data_list: You're just getting more precious memories.
You're just getting more precious memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that every new memory she has
gets added to her collection. It doesn't mean
she'll lose her old ones.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So it's like a big album with memories of America
and Japan? Oh, I see... It's like the clothes I was
wearing...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I chose the blouse 'cause it matched the cherry
blossoms, and I wore the pants with the stars on
'em 'cause I've always loved stars.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I like these cherry blossom picnics 'cause
they remind me of barbecues back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's like I've... mixed the two memories into one.
Right? That means...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's just like you said! I'm not losing memories! I'm
getting new ones! I'm so happy!
choice_data_list: Let's get all sorts of new ones!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's just like you said! I'm not losing memories! I'm
getting new ones! I'm so happy!
choice_data_list: Let's get all sorts of new ones!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm sure my folks'll want to see all kinds of
new things that I'm up to!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And what better time than now?! ☆ Let's get
filming! You're on camera duty! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, mmm, MMM, that's good! I've been
wanting to try this! And since it's a
limited-time-only cherry blossom flavor, you
could call it the taste of spring! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ I got the seat right next to the door! This
is the most popular seat on the train here in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And the last thing I wanna show you...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This is Nakayama Racecourse, where the Sprinters
Stakes is held! It's a real barnburner!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So many skilled runners race here. And... I'm doin'
my best to win, same as ever!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Actually... ever since I came here to Japan and
met my trainer, I've been running better than
ever!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My memories give me strength... so I wanna make
even more memories and get even better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She announces this passionately into the camera,
clearly burning with even more determination for
her future races!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! We're like two happy little peas in a pod!
We gotta get this on video!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: C'mere! Stand right next to me! Ready?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mama! Hey, Papa! Me'n Trainer here are
gonna be together forever, happy as can be! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
How so? You said you were happy, didn't ya?
...Aaand sent!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That was quick! I already got a reply! It's
for you! And in Japanese to boot!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It says... "Dear Trainer. If you and Taiki are
happy, we are happy!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yippee! Looks like everyone's happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't be sure if they got the right message, but
as long as Taiki Shuttle seems happy, I suppose
it's okay.
